textByHash.012322a3d9aee671e1840cc0149dca23f7a88637: A dragonkin? That's preposterous. The dragonkin have been dead for hundreds of years.
textByHash.023110c54cc845bd1d6ffce161adecee95aadc72: We may not all like each other, and some of us have a checkered history, but we will work together to destroy this enemy.
textByHash.029764a37014167526c5406877f31cad6f8e9de8: Our job here is to decide upon a solution and then enact it.
textByHash.04385cd004724743bee94820c508a19d9c779b90: If you get the authenticity of the shield verified by the curator at the museum and then return here with authentication, I will grant you your reward.
textByHash.04861998d054c7d8b500006bd3f662f0523e7112: Hello there. Do you need something?
textByHash.055e898dd02953a8de86f2157a361e90d257e3fb: Then why do you have it?
textByHash.05cf8b6f529385f94b90f7d8b6bdab6086460338: What were you saying about me following you somewhere?
textByHash.0727e2f595c531a85ee7ed7d331e339e362fb502: No you haven't, you're doing it now.
textByHash.0d62e1ff55bd22c6078c4480053a00a215de7930: They say that peace and tolerance are needed to maintain the balance. I've no doubt it's all a load of rubbish, but we can't proceed until we are sure.
textByHash.0d8b0bb9223520e1f9a715c0ddf637ef50ab2d63: Yes, yes, but we can start to make amends for that now, can't we?
textByHash.0defc67d6a5e57dca9128ee75474096a8a29a7d7: This is the reason why the lack of communication from him bothers me somewhat, although I am sure nobody would dare to try and attack our kingdom!
textByHash.0ea2696fae48ecb265708754b1c185e8f620bb52: You have news of Drezel for me?
textByHash.0f8e2d22efff91f7cf2b15d3be17647dc3e3018f: Well get back and find out at once! This is a matter of national security and if I find out we are vulnerable I will hold you personally responsible!
textByHash.1707829400300ba51841c6cef3cfe642bb079fd3: It depends on how long it takes the Church of Saradomin to read through the Guthixian edicts and return with an answer on how to proceed.
textByHash.174259b261b515bb217d557787ff4f9f481f6b67: If they're relying on support from Misthalin, you'll need to let them know that it might take some time before that happens.
textByHash.18ac42931e26d626ca5363b88e1472aacde50a62: Ah, well that must have been Drezel then. What did he say?
textByHash.1a420835ce9857d3960835d1c97cc7b7737dd578: And you are shouting at your king! People who yell at their monarchs often find their heads become...loose!
textByHash.1bbf510f2e641a6e5c13b62dd3939409038fc69e: You will have to excuse me, then. I am very busy as I have a kingdom to run!
textByHash.1d868d5e3245b8d76706afe86c6274ce415d535f: But Drakan has invaded Misthalin! I must respond!
textByHash.1f2d7d747d17d342699229046892fc7cdd5020cc: I will make the necessary preparations. In the meantime, citizen, you will visit King Thoros, Chieftain Brundt and Sir Amik Varze. Tell them to come to Varrock to discuss the dragon threat.
textByHash.228915ae9b4694a431781af48558bf1e58238a68: The Shield of Arrav, eh? Yes, I do recall my father, King Roald, put a reward out for that.
textByHash.235509d54f7950cfc7d1cc1185bb6ab4677759f6: That would be very good indeed. Your king commends you!
textByHash.27508e5f5cb9124080d47becdb39be7b5270fb39: We're all too aware of Drakan and his vampyres. What risk do they pose to Misthalin though?
textByHash.28c2e87bcc969e34b49d84c16e2d71c30d2c1b8c: It means that people can fight with the blessings of the king in defence of the kingdom.
textByHash.298d3d96927d8e172abb5b32f44c905731fd827d: Now that's a different matter. Lead on, peasant - let's see what my darling wife has been up to now.
textByHash.2b63e88ebe18473e6a284b81ef9bf85f94560d46: For Saradomin's sake! They have ships and they have soldiers! We need them on our side.
textByHash.2ba3fa01f7b19ac0b94e945a7cc6928e5bc24315: Please enter the answer to the question.
textByHash.2e9fc6265b4922d536450af20db4a05802a2a0e6: Talk to King Thoros, Chieftain Brundt and Sir Amik Varze. Tell them that they are needed in Varrock to discuss the dragon threat. Now hurry up and get it done.
textByHash.2fd2cae9f84b6a42b32bc6777e278a00117b84bd: Yes, I dare say it does. I wouldn't even have mentioned it had you not seemed to be looking for something to do anyway.
textByHash.308ed739edd1360e1b85b1367ac493178429b50c: It is said that when all three sides are joined in war, Guthix will 'reawaken and remake the world without mercy for the pain of beast or man.'
textByHash.317f42f587becc755b77c4150278f4500506095b: What? This is wholly unacceptable! I order you to do all that you can to free Drezel immediately!
textByHash.3272344f919e5de2e28a9c6fc650943a44d13b10: But that will take ages, we need to act now!
textByHash.35c4fc175c0212ef78ece23a0dae27363f341f91: I never thought I would live to see the day when someone came forward to claim this reward!
textByHash.3737370b375ea0d01524a0685c80fe8ac531c079: Well I suppose you've been a friend to Varrock in the past. What would you ask of us?
textByHash.3988360722a877536331b1130fec3ccddfa50819: You will be rewarded in the knowledge that you have done the right thing and assisted the king of Misthalin.
textByHash.398b2ae360bf7b5541711c80b272e713ca64fa8d: A member of the Phoenix Gang!
textByHash.3adff3b789078c1eeddc420efc2f2921aff36d09: Enough. This isn't like Morytania. There is no godly involvement here. This enemy is threatening us directly and we must respond.
textByHash.3b917138df3498ad7860cfb09b45de5087b39faa: Be a sport and go make sure that nothing untoward has happened to the silly old codger for me, would you?
textByHash.3c9e8c14e8927e36df11a83a76361c5d365f560d: Oh yes. Morytania is a fearful place, filled to the brim with accursed servants of the chaos god Zamorak. All of them are terrible, but none more so than the rulers of the region, the vampyres.
textByHash.3ff7b30fc318d4cbe9f65ebc0f51a1be0fe828a6: But I can't just stand here and do nothing, Aeonisig! I must try to help if I can.
textByHash.402abe8dfd8c54c2cdfd12979aeb3612f6e54664: I am sorry, but Aeonisig is my advisor, and what he says, while it pains me, is the truth. However, I will enact a mercenary protocol.
textByHash.40acfdd0973cc045514faa44c7363680a23013a4: Guthixian edicts rule over those of all other religions. Many followers of Guthix claim that the edicts have largely controlled the peace that Misthalin has experienced for so many years.
textByHash.41945c59bfc5f561e1809e062d8705f957fe4d07: I don't suppose you would fancy popping in and seeing him, would you?
textByHash.41cb697976cff3b8735bc44eb1de14e575fae4c8: Paterdomus, the temple where Drezel lives, stands on the eastern border of Misthalin. It guards the only passage into the evil lands of Morytania.
textByHash.44073bf3d5e90f5bda360dd3461d37c53f9d89b2: Oh yes, we need to consider that as well. You're right of course, Aeonisig. Do you know if these people follow Saradomin?
textByHash.46be8e97732e16821aa08569fb0ecf0531708730: The Shield of Arrav? Yes, I do recall my father put a reward out for that.
textByHash.4a61f961bfda8bae8760385a718bc3c549376e34: Well, in that case, it's only right that you both be rewarded. I will grant half of the reward to you and half to your companion. That means 600 coins for you. Enjoy it! You've very much earned it!
textByHash.4a6f974dfdc2a44a7ddc9289fc8a1d80399f7a8a: Do you have anything of importance to say?
textByHash.4dfaaa448c3775c9efcec61db958129d213a3459: If you mean the dragons that have been spotted flying around, we're well aware. I have my best people investigating this and we will make sure the citizens are safe. Now, be on your way.
textByHash.515b4f989db83abf686d3ee7b6c8bdc2ce85ac33: Listen, and listen well, and see if your puny mind can comprehend this: if the border is not protected, then we are all at the mercy of the vampyres!
textByHash.517e3adb83578b6a833ff45ff8cab0bc575a8986: Oh great, let's hope they don't eat into the walls.
textByHash.51824093b09497da3ce29d324cf8dcb7d6c832c0: Talk to King Lathas, Chieftain Brundt and Sir Amik Varze. Tell them that they are needed in Varrock to discuss the dragon threat. Now hurry up and get it done.
textByHash.544236b7c296b3f13bcd72fa4f0879c31167b8d4: Certainly. What seems to be the problem?
textByHash.553ee295495d798ed4cece44e6c17e342e179241: Misthalin is a Saradominist region, but Morytania is filled with creatures of Zamorak. A war between our two regions would be considered a war between Saradomin and Zamorak.
textByHash.558f830e5365b87eb3630b72c83f49874d0ab010: Just as I thought! Now off you go!
textByHash.5845f147160ad71426564d07f160186ec52fc13a: Should make a nice table and chairs.
textByHash.588efd6a3f6d33a5222b058670db211890944eb1: Of course I know what it means. But this citizen is right, we have no choice.
textByHash.59b230a5c157e59c226720468666e6a0d21470e1: It doesn't seem to be doing anything special.
textByHash.5c051bed4ecfcaeb990aea01a340010836c4923b: Whatever you want, adventurer, it will need to wait. In case you hadn't noticed, there are zombies all over the palace!
textByHash.5ce0e7a54b3f7df7045d0890a809f10c17fec1a8: I dare say you gave fight and slaughtered the foul beasts where they stood!
textByHash.61d1ba0347ef72e850cbbbbaffccdaefe24b42e9: Now, you should get moving. Time is not on our side. While you're gone, I'll have Aeonisig reach out to some other people as well. We need all the help we can get.
textByHash.640831c052bf9419225e0f42b4e68f843b8c35ea: I'm afraid that's only half the reward certificate. You'll have to get the other half and join them together if you want to claim the reward.
textByHash.673a9082062448a9968a2bc449e6c58b2cc99099: No, you absolute cretin! Obviously some fiend has done something to Drezel and tricked your feeble intellect into helping them kill that guard dog!
textByHash.67b8325caf9d363fcb9c9ea3c3c3d9ba333b3944: I would say that me shouting at you for your incompetence is the LEAST of your worries right now. NOW GO!
textByHash.67c3000c4b5c80b46a53baed1b3129e4c11c876d: Orchids bring me out in a rash.
textByHash.6b17998e591f8db211bb5b5aeb7712d9fd031edd: Forgiveness is something that cannot be earned so easily. And I'm certainly not following you off on some wild goose chase when I have important matters of state to attend to.
textByHash.6c8aa569ca50df3f7a2a573033f7e109d454014c: Ah, I see. In that case keep up the good work.
textByHash.7165a9e0f2a0825048d81ec824553af339498ee2: Well then you'd better get out there and find them! These zombies need to be stopped!
textByHash.7275f8cea7ce59e752d2a8727c16153eb9ee4a88: This is murder on my hay fever you know...
textByHash.734b9eb18b8bd2f2e76b2064b740968f042a6b04: Now you get back there and do whatever is necessary to safeguard the kingdom from attack, or I will see you beheaded for high treason!
textByHash.74c50f6bb2afa125ae998dfacd83ff2e90776d42: Okay, so if I don't say anything, you won't answer me back.
textByHash.75254ef3c5cf9e234311027ad156ffb2c0ea9c12: A quest you say? Hmm, what an odd request to make of the king. It's funny you should mention it though, as there is something you can do for me.
textByHash.75563ca6586a1127b291b67ed36954599e1c1002: You as well? Put your petty disagreements aside and look at the big picture. We must all work together if we are to survive.
textByHash.778768304fe3a854a424308757213216cbb1d459: The Guthixian edicts prevent us from doing too much at this point, but this situation in Morytania requires some action. Unfortunately, this is the best thing I can think of at the moment.
textByHash.7a2c5f54b7314975b0b5bc5abfec8673d781a51e: Well then, I must try to do something to satisfy you. I will have my advisor Aeonisig teleport you to Paterdomus so that you are more quickly on your way. Will you accept my offer?
textByHash.7e55b20b81059b86c657397847859aa757142c1f: My goodness! This claim is for the reward offered by my father many years ago!
textByHash.7ea4726ce384c661ccbf7aaa17ea23938af3c26b: Normally, if a force is amassed, they may be considered a threat to Misthalin's national security. We'd have to send the army to disband them.
textByHash.7ec084f216236f67b4de5fad1b01d4e76e77d806: You will have to excuse me then. I am very busy as I have a kingdom to run!
textByHash.8248e5df510e36302f3341acd72ec3bafde33244: Have you been spending my money again?
textByHash.82696e04ecc2e1f7a2a1d02fed99ead15f149b31: Hmm, how strange that you don't. Well anyway, it has been some days since last I heard from Drezel, the priest who lives there.
textByHash.885a46a619f118576ac2dd749301df3c7404533a: Hmmm. I see. I appreciate your concern. However, I assure you, I am quite safe here. My guards are on full alert at all times.
textByHash.88d2216d60acca875c522dca86ad6bc605431bf2: Hello there. Have you spoken to the other leaders yet?
textByHash.88f78e7e3c1559fb711bad7df0364849e4b8709b: Very good. My advisor, Aeonisig, will teleport you back. The best of luck to you.
textByHash.8aea154f00d09e530af04c71dd652cd2e052ccc6: Well, that is a slightly impertinent question to ask of your king, but I shall overlook it this time.
textByHash.8d2f28312ec6b2a5c57987785a497b2041cfc013: Good work gathering the other leaders. The meeting will begin shortly. Head into the dining room when you are ready.
textByHash.8d796e695d62fb4e019ece65f220bec982d15510: We do. Unless anyone has any complaints. ? You've been very quiet throughout this. What are your thoughts?
textByHash.8ec6c84d2627206e0d4953f4a76781f74dedd3b0: I'm sorry, I'll stop speaking to you then.
textByHash.8f610a522235fb9e1a8b8456768bb4f4101f8b33: That mausoleum contains the only passage between Morytania and Misthalin! Not only that, it's built right over the source of the River Salve!
textByHash.8f73efcfd6aaa430de337e728059102d2e85a7f5: Many thanks adventurer! I would have sent one of my squires but they wanted payment for it!
textByHash.90320116e3b0296c896ab9ca4e1b80c665a93cd8: You have? Well, before we go any further, you'll need to get the authenticity of the shield verified by the curator at the museum.
textByHash.961e8da9c03d50311d2bf654de43764722726844: Well get to it then, rather than standing there yapping at me!
textByHash.970570cea690427f096d6bd0b635c7486ee7135f: I take no joy in it, but war may be the only option here. If even half of what history says is true, the dragonkin are merciless.
textByHash.993bb6fab60efca0b6026e1af45f16995d482ee4: Well I expect you to offer him your full assistance in whatever he needs.
textByHash.9a44a8d1b31ecd8d619aa76405790852c08c1e96: Yes, citizen. Do you need something?
textByHash.9ab464631e0395e5b9274c820e459f27dbee6b8a: Thank you all for coming. As I'm sure you are aware, we are facing one of the greatest threats ever seen in our time.
textByHash.9b5aa750e498a3d7aab40ed33b2370ad9be11fcf: Personally, I don't think so. However, Aeonisig does not feel we should risk it until we can do further research on the Guthixian edicts.
textByHash.9b5dfa4ac3d601fb4506ac09f105de02934c0c2e: Thank you very much my darling.
textByHash.9cfc2aebc0f18484a322e8688a9ac4a9cc71dfe9: Then why do you keep answering me back?
textByHash.9fc63954754f7ea0f3bb75b469f624874b4f3c07: I will make the necessary preparations. In the meantime, citizen, you will visit King Lathas, Chieftain Brundt and Sir Amik Varze. Tell them to come to Varrock to discuss the dragon threat.
textByHash.a00d7dfa283fe6f848488c714388960f5442d037: If I send troops to Morytania, there is risk that the balance will be disrupted. Many followers of Guthix are apparently bound by oath to fight to keep the balance.
textByHash.a08b543b1b0c7f16eb3048093d3f6f69e8df1c6b: YES YOU DID!!!!! Without that 'dog', there's nothing to stop someone from entering the mausoleum to sabotage the blessings on the river. Thanks to you, all of Misthalin is now at risk!
textByHash.a0f00588e614ac68f047fcebad3465dd1d5c872a: Oh! Good, then you can answer this question for me!
textByHash.a258efaf6cb18c62f3ca06d2b2f469a790c7553c: The Guthixian edicts supposedly exist to ensure a balance is kept when it comes to religious and spiritual beliefs in the world. At the moment, things are considered to be in balance.
textByHash.a27900e411f4210636df7b3f636d53f05a1395ce: Drezel is descended from one of the original Saradominist priests who first blessed the river. His job is to ensure nothing happens to the river that might allow the evil of Morytania to invade this land.
textByHash.a358842a6fc09a8f4b24e7babe7d357f79c87c61: Apparently, some followers of Guthix have sworn an oath to perform ceremonies to try and re-awaken Guthix if the edicts are broken.
textByHash.a4a2d6ed288c5df32773d47cba35d63c1d53442e: This is awful! Yes, yes of course, we must do something!
textByHash.a5e9ac0edf640a987a57c224de9544e55f323e8a: Follow you?!? I am the King! I am the followed, not the follower!!
textByHash.aaba7687624ede34d7d1dd3d978243948bb5dc3c: I heard that you found half the shield, so I will give you half of the bounty. That comes to exactly 600gp!
textByHash.ab0611614bf50c07e3dacff71e6501b8d02d7f91: Thankfully, the sacred River Salve marks a natural border between Misthalin and Morytania. Together, the river and the temple prevent any invasion by the vampyres.
textByHash.abbdb4f9c705a2aa2823c33fe45b05fe68ae0274: Yes, yes! I will ready my army and prepare to enter Morytania via Paterdomus. Morytania has for too long threatened the borders of Misthalin.
textByHash.b043a40dc18049f274a8928ff9ccc2021e8c577b: Our armies are preparing for the assault on Ungael. Speak to Torfinn in Rellekka when you are ready, he will take you to the fleet.
textByHash.b12b70cf23c3976d76327cd49b4861967e16bf9e: I'm very sorry, but I'm currently rather busy. Apparently old Drezel is having a bit of bother near Paterdomus and I have to try and sort someone out to go and visit him.
textByHash.b2e371f426698289fabe0ad6f874784fc9ebae65: As you are no doubt aware, this kingdom worships Saradomin, the god of wisdom and order. As such, it is a peaceful place to live and prosper.
textByHash.b32a6cd2ac53d30507621b3389cacb1aac83ac2d: Good work! Always a place for quick thinkers in my kingdom!
textByHash.b34ae5f12910b254f91cc76ff46f4303ba404f68: However, a mercenary protocol allows a group to form a mercenary company. They are allowed certain rights so long as they operate within the law.
textByHash.b675e31b8e8f1fd9cca3da5ac77988970723a6e3: Have you ensured Misthalin's border is fully secured?
textByHash.b7218d7369c14ec8d210ca93f806ae274f8dcce5: Why haven't you ensured the border with Morytania is secure yet?
textByHash.b9d859140fd8ee812361caed432c58c6b5059fcb: Then we are agreed. This room contains some of the most powerful people in the world. Heroes and rulers alike. We may be the only thing that stands in the way of annihilation.
textByHash.bc11f4d9b300e11621974ad0389fa3d60206c51e: Don't worry, you can't miss it.
textByHash.bc8fff383225671adaf7b36b61e09ab7f2791d77: Well hello there. What do you want?
textByHash.be3b445d3ca34c2c82ad2d85c1da6d293f2f016e: Enough. This enemy is threatening us directly and we must respond.
textByHash.be493307f43ef467a20e1df064485d8128c42437: In the meantime, we will look into the Guthixian edicts and find a way to rid ourselves of Drakan for good.
textByHash.bf910fe94f1b80bfe2e4fe6b2c7c266f84e70e49: I fear we don't have a choice. The risks are great, but they were always going to be with a threat like this.
textByHash.cb153fecb8ee04c279391f348dec8a507dcbbc63: This will allow all able-bodied men to fight in the defence of Misthalin for glory and spoils. You will find that many sword arms from Misthalin should soon join the resistance force.
textByHash.cb2f969eede8eeed02293086b97ca6189f034c6b: Aha! Good work adventurer! What news of the border defences against Morytania?
textByHash.cb99fa973388b909e2ba257ceec555d0bffd2736: This sounds pretty grave, please go on.
textByHash.cc282635e346c9416733c4d45cc4488e42e2868f: It seems to me that if that letter were genuine, I would be forced to arrest its bearer for treason. You understand.
textByHash.cec8a86705e76bc6f0f56f87d4eb3aabeb4dbf3b: And I've had enough of peasantry! Get out of my castle!
textByHash.d06daf25112ad2fe6c508f9713f2978f305ef052: Drezel is the priest who lives at Paterdomus, the temple to the east. You're supposed to be making sure that nothing bad has happened to him. Remember?
textByHash.d25d3ace05289860d28a9ed2bb94c6ad585dc1f6: No one has figured out how to unlock the powers of the shield in hundreds of years! Are we so desperate that we are relying on legends?
textByHash.d26b3e5c3e97f5d3981dfa5a5955143149fb93b2: Err, that sounds a little wrong to me.
textByHash.d377ffa30ab8b1f040433acf7bec23dbe945a81b: Ah, that's a shame - I could have done with a breath of fresh air.
textByHash.d7eb46829ca919fbe2457ab932d8ccb469fcaadb: What have you been up to now, pumpkin?
textByHash.e19b0a490845d0fe8ca035ac28727a9e81ef139f: My goodness! This is for the reward offered by my father many years ago! I never thought I would live to see the day when someone came forward to claim it!
textByHash.e1c6dbc2da471fa08c84390ce7c5be88a0797555: Are you aware of Paterdomus? It's a temple east of here. It stands on the River Salve and guards the only passage into the deadly lands of Morytania.
textByHash.e666cfa4dd6997306b8258e0686ae56c8ad93301: Well of course! Would you expect anything less of the man who is king?
textByHash.ea1834dc9ddd1b114340e972cadd9d6590614185: A vampyre? Well, I order you to do something about it at once!
textByHash.ed3c53b63b147c1e9700b679c93b1867f2b7182c: The temple of Paterdomus where Drezel lives. It is but a short journey east from here. It lies south of the cliffs, at the source of the River Salve.
textByHash.edd6d57cad5a7a71f5b4b3b45a692e9b945538f7: That is for you to decide, but I would assume that you'd want to report back to your comrades in Morytania.
textByHash.ee901fffcb4d7f2b2d0947c7d4fbc0bef8e45df8: You're quite argumentative for a peasant.
textByHash.f0a2309770add3512effaee23360dd2aac957b00: Letter? Let me see. Where's Postie Pete? He usually deals with the mail around here.
textByHash.f4c496bead423da748176c62ea8b594ba210ddb8: Is there a reason for you being here?
textByHash.f50d5d293047661496bf4d4797939a01121ff805: The citizens must take priority. If we have an opportunity to keep the danger away from them, we should take it.
textByHash.f92dca2ee7cf1f0f2a6d651ef05da38391fd2af8: I understand perfectly. Now, for all I know, that letter could be a fake ruse. We get a lot of that sort of thing and it causes a lot of hassle.
textByHash.f9e3ee53c9c14815fd90649ace795935eef712a7: The waters of the river are kept blessed with Saradomin's almighty power. This ensures our defences remain strong, as the vampyres cannot cross such a holy barrier.
textByHash.fc5d42ca61952950fd99965b667d3d396dddae49: Ah, it's you again. Hello there.
textByHash.fe58ac774dba3913aed32691fd731327e2a79c7d: Very well. Come back if you change your mind.
